inputs.label: Current Training Max
inputs.businessContext: The lifter's current one-rep max for the exercise in kg.

inputs.label: Current Average Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Average training intensity as percentage of 1RM.

inputs.label: Current Weekly Volume Load
inputs.businessContext: Total weekly volume load in kilograms (sets x reps x weight).

inputs.label: Deload Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the deload phase in weeks.

inputs.label: Intensity Reduction
inputs.businessContext: Reduction in intensity percentage points during deload.

inputs.label: Volume Reduction
inputs.businessContext: Percentage reduction in volume load during deload.
